title: Deterministic Billing for E2E — QZPay test-control wiring + date-aware publish gate

tasks.title: Document the entitlement middleware 6h cron-lag grace and decide the shared is-sub-live predicate shape
tasks.description: Investigation only, no production code. Locate the entitlement middleware's existing cron-lag grace check and the BILLING_CRON_LAG_GRACE_HOURS=6 constant (apps/api/src/middlewares/entitlement.ts + docs/billing/grace-period-source-of-truth.md). Decide the signature/location of a shared isSubscriptionLive(status, trialEnd, currentPeriodEnd, graceHours) predicate to be reused by both the middleware and checkEligibility (single source of truth). Output: a short design note in the spec docs dir. No tests (no code).

subtasks.title: Locate middleware grace check + grace constant
Decide shared predicate signature + home package

tasks.title: Map ControllableOperation enum to QZPay adapter methods
tasks.description: Investigation only, no production code. Read @qazuor/qzpay-core and packages/billing/src/adapters/qzpay-test-control.ts to build the exact mapping from each ControllableOperation enum value (startTrial, cancelTrial, updateSubscription, etc.) to the real adapter method that createMercadoPagoAdapter() exposes. Document the map (table) for T-006 to consume. No tests (no code).

subtasks.title: Trace each to the qzpay-core adapter method

tasks.title: Extract shared isSubscriptionLive(status, dates, grace) predicate
tasks.description: Create a single helper that decides whether a subscription counts as live: status IN (active,trialing) AND the relevant expiry date (trial_end for trialing, current_period_end for active) is not past beyond the reused BILLING_CRON_LAG_GRACE_HOURS=6 grace. Place it where both the entitlement middleware and service-core can import it (per T-001 decision). UNIT TESTS REQUIRED: cover active/trialing/cancelled/past_due × within-grace / past-grace / null-date / no-date. Test file colocated with the helper (e.g. packages/.../__tests__/is-subscription-live.test.ts).

subtasks.title: Implement predicate reusing the 6h grace constant
Unit tests for status × date × grace matrix

tasks.title: Make checkEligibility date-aware via the shared predicate
tasks.description: Change checkEligibility (apps/api/src/services/accommodation-publish-deps.ts:71-94 — NOT service-core, see T-001 note) to use isSubscriptionLive instead of the status-only check, so an expired-trial / lapsed host (date past 6h grace) returns subscription_required. UNIT TESTS REQUIRED: trialing within grace -> has_active_sub; trialing past trial_end+6h -> subscription_required; active past current_period_end+6h -> subscription_required; active within grace -> has_active_sub. Closes the production gap (G4).

subtasks.title: Swap status-only check for shared predicate
Unit tests for the date-aware gate

tasks.resultRef: apps/api/src/services/accommodation-publish-deps.ts (checkEligibility date-aware; 8 unit tests). Closes prod gap G4.

tasks.title: Refactor entitlement middleware grace to use the shared predicate
tasks.description: Replace the entitlement middleware's inline cron-lag grace logic with the shared isSubscriptionLive predicate, so there is exactly one definition of subscription liveness. Behavior MUST be unchanged for active subs. UNIT TESTS REQUIRED: regression that the middleware's active-sub grace behavior is identical before/after (active within 6h grace still live, past grace not). No new behavior.

subtasks.title: Swap inline grace for shared predicate

tasks.resultRef: entitlement.ts withinWindow now calls isSubscriptionLive (shared threshold). Behavior-preserving: SPEC-148 grace tests (278) unchanged green. Middleware keeps its own detail math (hoursOverdue/hoursRemaining) since it needs observability, not just a boolean.

tasks.title: Wire applyTestControl into the MercadoPago adapter
tasks.description: In packages/billing/src/adapters/mercadopago.ts, wrap the adapter returned by createMercadoPagoAdapter() (Option A, FINDING 1). Construction-time gate: if !isTestControlEnabled() return the real adapter unwrapped (zero prod overhead); else return a wrapper that routes subscriptions.create->startTrial, subscriptions.update->updateSubscription, subscriptions.cancel->cancelTrial through applyTestControl. Only those 3 (the ops the specs exercise); other ControllableOperations intentionally not wired (uncertain mappings, no spec needs them; cancelTrial/cancelSubscription collision documented). UNIT TESTS REQUIRED: per wired op, queue failNext and assert the wrapped method throws + records; assert pass-through records 'ok'; assert no-op (real adapter returned) when flag off.

subtasks.title: Guard wrap behind isTestControlEnabled() (no-op when off)
Unit tests per operation + no-op path

tasks.resultRef: mercadopago.ts wraps subscriptions.create/update/cancel through applyTestControl (Option A) when test-control enabled; construction-time gate = zero prod overhead. 14 unit tests.

tasks.title: Enable HOSPEDA_QZPAY_TEST_CONTROL_ENABLED in e2e-pr.yml
tasks.description: Add HOSPEDA_QZPAY_TEST_CONTROL_ENABLED: 'true' to the env block of .github/workflows/e2e-pr.yml so the qzpay-control route mounts and Group B fault-injection specs run in the PR P0 suite (OQ-3 decision). One-line change. Verification: the value appears in the workflow env; Group B specs no longer self-skip on 404 once T-006 lands.

tasks.title: Un-gate host-04 and host-07b and verify they pass vs the date-aware gate
tasks.description: Remove the env-flag test.fixme guard from host-04-cancellation-grace and host-07b-subscription-required. They already set status='cancelled' directly, so the date-aware checkEligibility (T-004) blocks them deterministically. Verify both specs pass un-gated locally (PATCH ACTIVE -> 403, accommodation stays DRAFT). E2E specs ARE the tests (AC-1.2, AC-1.3). If either does not pass, diagnose before forcing.

subtasks.title: Remove env guard from host-04 + host-07b
Run both specs un-gated, confirm 403 + DRAFT

tasks.resultRef: host-04/07b un-gated + green vs date-aware gate; write-gate hardened in accommodation.service.ts (7 unit tests)

tasks.title: Fix forceTrialExpired and un-gate host-03 (trial-expired blocks writes)
tasks.description: Ensure forceTrialExpired (apps/e2e/fixtures/db-helpers.ts:122) backdates trial_end and current_period_end beyond the 6h grace while keeping status='trialing' (the cron-lag-window state). Remove host-03's env-flag test.fixme guard. With the date-aware gate (T-004), the publish PATCH must now return 403 and the accommodation stays DRAFT, while reads still work. E2E spec IS the test (AC-1.1). Verify locally.

subtasks.title: Confirm/adjust forceTrialExpired backdates beyond grace, keeps trialing
Run host-03 un-gated, confirm 403 + DRAFT + reads OK

tasks.resultRef: host-03 un-gated + green; required the broad write-gate (gate edits to ACTIVE accommodations), see spec §5.2.2

tasks.title: Assert e2e helper terminal statuses match cron output
tasks.description: Add a guard (unit or e2e assertion, AC-1.4) that the terminal subscription statuses produced by the Group A helpers match what production crons write: trial-expiry -> 'cancelled' (via cancel()), finalize-cancelled-subs -> 'cancelled'. Prevents the helpers from validating a fictional status the system never produces. TEST REQUIRED: assert helper target status is in the cron's documented output set.
tasks.resultRef: apps/e2e/test/unit/e2e-helper-subscription-statuses.test.ts (4 tests): helper statuses 'cancelled'/'trialing' are valid enum members and match cron output (finalize-cancelled-subs -> cancelled)

tasks.title: Un-skip host-07c (startTrial timeout safety)
tasks.description: Relax the test.fixme/404 self-skip in host-07c-qzpay-timeout now that T-006 wires fault injection and T-007 enables the flag. Verify: failNext(startTrial, TIMEOUT) -> publish PATCH returns 5xx, accommodation stays DRAFT, no billing_subscriptions row created (AC-2.1). E2E spec IS the test.

tasks.title: Un-skip host-07d (tx compensation)
tasks.description: Relax the self-skip in host-07d-tx-compensation. Verify: failNext(updateSubscription) -> cancelTrial recorded as compensation (AC-2.2). E2E spec IS the test.

tasks.title: Un-skip res-01 (api-down checkout retry)
tasks.description: Relax the self-skip in res-01-api-down-checkout. Verify: first publish 5xx with no sub row, then retry with no fault queued succeeds and the sub is created (AC-2.3). E2E spec IS the test.

tasks.title: Rewrite skip comments and messages to reflect the real mechanism
tasks.description: US-3 honest gating. Across all six specs, remove the incorrect 'entitlement middleware draft-defaults grants writes' mental model from comments/messages. State the real precondition where a guard remains (Group A: gated on the date-aware publish gate, no flag; Group B: fault injection requires test-control adapter wired + flag). AC-3.1, AC-3.2. Docs-only change to test files.

tasks.title: Add a no-silent-skip regression guard
tasks.description: Add a CI/lint check or meta-test that fails if any of the six target specs (host-03/04/07b/07c/07d, res-01) is reintroduced as test.fixme/test.skip without an explicit documented precondition annotation. Prevents silent regression back to skipped. TEST REQUIRED: the guard itself fails on a planted skip and passes on the current state.

subtasks.title: Implement the guard (lint rule or meta-test)
Self-test: fails on planted skip, passes otherwise

tasks.title: Soak: 3 consecutive green PR P0 runs
tasks.description: Run the PR P0 suite three times and confirm the six newly un-skipped specs pass with zero flakiness (especially the Group B fault-injection specs). Record the run IDs/results in the spec docs. If any flake, diagnose; if Group B proves flaky, fall back to moving it to nightly (documented fallback). Final verification gate for the spec.
